message:
feat(config): add LintCommand/BuildCommand fields and parameterize formulas

Add lint_command and build_command to MergeQueueConfig alongside existing
test_command. Replace hardcoded Go commands in polecat-work and
sync-workspace formulas with {{test_command}}, {{lint_command}},
{{build_command}} template variables with Go defaults as fallback.

This prepares formulas for multi-stack support without adding auto-detection
yet. Users can configure commands in settings/config.json.

Cherry-picked from PR #982.

Co-Authored-By: John Reitano <noreply@users.github.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -152,7 +152,7 @@ let someone else's mess consume your entire mission.
 ```bash
 git stash                   # Save your branch state
 git checkout origin/main
-go test ./...               # Or appropriate test command
+{{test_command}}            # Run tests (configured per-rig)
 ```
 
 **2. If tests PASS:**
@@ -287,8 +287,7 @@ Verify your changes don't break anything and are properly tested.
 
 **1. Run the full test suite:**
 ```bash
-go test ./...               # For Go projects
-# Or appropriate command for your stack
+{{test_command}}            # Run tests (configured per-rig)
 ```
 
 **ALL TESTS MUST PASS.** Do not proceed with failures.
@@ -303,7 +302,7 @@ go test ./...               # For Go projects
 # Check if failure exists on main:
 git stash
 git checkout main
-go test ./...
+{{test_command}}
 git checkout -
 git stash pop
 ```
@@ -315,11 +314,11 @@ git stash pop
 
 **4. Run any other quality checks:**
 ```bash
-# Linting (if configured)
-golangci-lint run ./...
+# Linting
+{{lint_command}}
 
 # Build check
-go build ./...
+{{build_command}}
 ```
 
 **Exit criteria:** All tests pass, new code has appropriate test coverage."""
@@ -472,3 +471,15 @@ You are NOT involved in any of that. You're gone. Done means gone.
 [vars.issue]
 description = "The issue ID assigned to this polecat"
 required = true
+
+[vars.test_command]
+description = "Command to run tests (auto-detected from rig settings)"
+default = "go test ./..."
+
+[vars.lint_command]
+description = "Command to run linting (auto-detected from rig settings)"
+default = "golangci-lint run ./..."
+
+[vars.build_command]
+description = "Command to run build (auto-detected from rig settings)"
+default = "go build ./..."

@@ -308,9 +308,9 @@ description = """
 Ensure the codebase compiles.
 
 ```bash
-{{ build_command }}
+{{build_command}}
 # Default: go build ./...
-# Configure via build_command variable for non-Go projects
+# Configured per-rig in settings/config.json
 ```
 
 **If build succeeds:** Continue to next step.
@@ -344,9 +344,9 @@ description = """
 Verify tests pass on current baseline.
 
 ```bash
-{{ test_command }}
+{{test_command}}
 # Default: go test ./...
-# Configure via test_command variable for non-Go projects
+# Configured per-rig in settings/config.json
 ```
 
 **If tests pass:** Continue to next step.
@@ -489,3 +489,12 @@ gt mail send --human -s "SYNC_FAILED $(hostname)" -m "<report with failure detai
 ```
 
 **Exit criteria:** Readiness signaled, molecule complete."""
+
+[vars]
+[vars.test_command]
+description = "Command to run tests (auto-detected from rig settings)"
+default = "go test ./..."
+
+[vars.build_command]
+description = "Command to run build (auto-detected from rig settings)"
+default = "go build ./..."

@@ -833,6 +833,12 @@ type MergeQueueConfig struct {
 	// TestCommand is the command to run for tests.
 	TestCommand string `json:"test_command,omitempty"`
 
+	// LintCommand is the command to run for linting (used by formulas).
+	LintCommand string `json:"lint_command,omitempty"`
+
+	// BuildCommand is the command to run for building (used by formulas).
+	BuildCommand string `json:"build_command,omitempty"`
+
 	// DeleteMergedBranches controls whether to delete branches after merging.
 	DeleteMergedBranches bool `json:"delete_merged_branches"`
